name: Zanarkand Cloister of Trials
steps: Step on the green square near the entrance to activate the floor puzzle. The solution pattern is displayed on the far wall.
Step on the floor panels to light the colored shapes matching the pattern shown. If you activate a shape NOT in the pattern, you must start over.
Complete all four pedestal sub-puzzles (Northwest, Southwest, Southeast, Northeast) in sequence — each one adds more ceiling nodes to the main chamber symbol.
Once all four pedestal puzzles are solved, the floor pattern is fully illuminated and the path to the Chamber of the Fayth opens.
Note: The Destruction Sphere cannot be retrieved on your first visit. Return via airship after acquiring it to access the hidden chest.
